_description: MacFitz manual split overrides for Barry's Cheltenham 2026 competition
_strategy: MacFitz follows Surebet EXCEPT where a near-tie justifies a different selection. Overrides are keyed by exact race_name from CheltenhamPicks DynamoDB.
_note: Races with gap <= _auto_split_threshold where no manual override exists will be flagged as NEW_CLOSE_CALL in the HTML regen log but NOT auto-split without human confirmation.

Conditional Jockeys Handicap Hurdle.reason: Dead heat 93-93 - coin flip, MacFitz takes the alternative runner
Conditional Jockeys Handicap Hurdle._deactivated: Sounds Russian not entered for Cheltenham (Betfair ANTEPOST: absent 2026-03-06). Both entries revert to Waterford Whispers.

Plate Handicap Chase.reason: 1pt gap (94 vs 93) - effectively tied, MacFitz takes alternative
Plate Handicap Chase._deactivated: Grange Walk not entered for Cheltenham (Betfair ANTEPOST: absent 2026-03-06). Both entries revert to highest remaining scorer (Down Memory Lane).

Cheltenham Plate Chase.reason: 4pt gap (98 vs 94) — Madara is the defending champion of this exact race (Won 2024 Cheltenham Plate Chase) at 5/1; Down Memory Lane is a first-timer at 18/1. Festival specialist override justified.

Cheltenham Gold Cup.reason: 5pt gap (164 vs 159) - Fastorslow was 2025 Gold Cup runner-up, outstanding festival form justifies the split on the biggest race
